cover.subtitle:
미륵사지·석가탑·다보탑,
돌이 만든 천 년의 선.
cover.imagePrompt: Ancient Korean stone pagoda illustration. ONE solitary multi-tiered stone pagoda (suggesting Mireuksa-ji or Seokga-tap) standing in a temple courtyard at dawn, with a single monk figure in gray robe sweeping the stone path beside it. Background: temple gate silhouette and distant misty mountains. Composition: vertical, contemplative. Color: weathered stone-gray + clay-brown + soft amber dawn light. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

outro.tip_headline:
"미륵사 최고 · 정림사 평제탑"
백제 두 탑을 한 짝으로.
outro.tip_body: 심화 시험에서는 석탑 사진을 보고 시대·소재지를 묻는다. 미륵사지(익산·최고·금제 사리봉안기)와 정림사지(부여·평제탑)를 묶고, 감은사지(신문왕·정형 확립)와 석가탑(무구정광대다라니경)을 통일신라로 연결할 것.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized three-tiered stone pagoda silhouette icon shown from a slight angle. RIGHT: a small woodblock-print scroll suggesting Mugujeonggwang dharani sutra. Cream #F2EDE3 base + stone-gray #888278 accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.
